title: valeriana muelleri
intro: Valeriana muelleri, also known as the New Zealand valerian or Mueller's valerian, is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. It is a perennial herb native to New Zealand and has been used for its medicinal and health benefits. The plant contains valerenic acid, which has been shown to possess sedative and anxiolytic properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting relaxation, reducing stress, and improving sleep quality. Valeriana muelleri can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness.
